name: preset-agent-skills
description: Preset API skills for authentication, workspace discovery, team/workspace administration, and Superset workspace API workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Authenticate with Preset, administer teams/workspaces, and use Superset workspace APIs.
interface.longDescription: Markdown skills for agents using the public Preset Management API and workspace Superset APIs. Includes guarded authentication guidance, workspace discovery, admin workflows for memberships, invites, roles, audits, version-aware Superset OpenAPI discovery, dashboard/chart, dataset/database, SQL Lab, import/export, and embedding guidance.
defaultPrompt: List audit logs for my Preset team
List dashboards in a Preset workspace
